meta_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no version control (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no version control. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing & Version Control: Advanced AI Builder Guide
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing and fix version control issues. An advanced guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade applications.
content.answer_block: Implement a robust version control system using Git and integrate Stripe Billing for SaaS pricing to turn your prototype into a professional product. By leveraging Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for automated refactoring, you ensure your codebase is scalable, monetizable, and protected against catastrophic data loss.
content.intro:
The cold sweat of a corrupted repository is a rite of passage every developer fears. You have poured weeks of logic into your first SaaS, only to realize that without version control, your entire history is a house of cards waiting for a single `rm -rf` to collapse. This lack of guardrails turns innovation into a high-stakes gamble where every commit is a potential disaster.

But the path to senior-level engineering is paved with systems, not just code. By mastering version control alongside professional SaaS pricing models, you transform from a student tinkering with snippets into an architect building a business. Let’s bridge the gap between your local environment and production-ready resilience using modern AI-assisted workflows.

steps.title: Initialize Repository with Branching Strategy
steps.description: Establish a Git flow that separates stable production code from experimental feature branches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Architect a standard Git branching strategy for a SaaS project, including setup for main, develop, and feature branches.

steps.title: Configure Stripe SaaS Pricing Logic
steps.description: Integrate Stripe's API to handle tiered subscription models securely.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure backend service for Stripe subscription checkout sessions with support for monthly and yearly tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add stripe-node && claude run 'implement subscription checkout session'

steps.title: Automate Version Control via Claude Code
steps.description: Use AI to automate commit messages and code review processes to maintain history integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a pre-commit hook script that validates code style and executes automated tests before allowing a commit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create pre-commit hook for linting and test validation'

steps.title: Environment Variable Hardening
steps.description: Protect your pricing API keys and environment secrets from being exposed in version control.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure .env management strategy using dotenv and ensure sensitive keys are ignored by Git.
steps.claude_code_command: echo '.env' >> .gitignore && claude run 'securely refactor config loading'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Synchronization
steps.description: Sync your version-controlled repository with a staging environment to test pricing flows before live deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a CI/CD pipeline configuration that deploys only after all unit tests pass in the develop branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure github actions for automated deployment'

pro_tips: Always use Semantic Versioning (SemVer) for your releases to track breaking changes in your pricing API.
Utilize 'Git LFS' if your project includes large AI model weights to keep your repository lean.
Implement a 'Feature Flag' system so you can toggle pricing tiers in production without redeploying code.
Use Claude Code to perform 'diff-based' refactoring, ensuring you never overwrite existing business logic.
Audit your dependencies monthly using 'npm audit' or 'pip-audit' to prevent supply-chain vulnerabilities.
content.next_steps: After securing your code, deploy your pricing page to a staging environment and run a mock transaction using Stripe's Test Mode to verify your end-to-end integration.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just writing code; you are building a product that can scale. Take control of your workflow, protect your hard work, and start monetizing your vision today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
